message:
feat: enhance conformance benchmarks and add kqueue reactor

Conformance improvements:
- Update bench/mod.rs with new benchmark infrastructure
- Improve bench/report.rs output formatting
- Enhance bench/runner.rs execution logic
- Update lib.rs exports

Runtime improvements:
- Add kqueue.rs reactor for macOS/BSD systems
- Update reactor/mod.rs with kqueue integration
- Update macos.rs reactor bindings
- Enhance process.rs with better signal handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
